notes: Battery life optimizations for the 400 mAh pack. Dynamic CPU frequency: 160 MHz during a ride, 80 MHz on idle / menu screens (~40% less active current). BLE TX power dropped from +3 dBm to 0 dBm (range is still plenty for a phone in your pocket). Display refresh slowed from 10 Hz to 5 Hz on fully-static screens (IDLE, MENU). Expect ~25% longer ride time and roughly double the idle standby time.
